title: Implement Event-Driven Scaling
description: Architect event-driven systems that scale based on queue depth using services like SQS or Kinesis. Implement auto-scaling mechanisms that react dynamically to traffic bursts and message backlogs. Design robust, reactive systems optimized for cost-efficiency and performance under variable load.
objectives: Architect event-driven systems that scale based on queue depth using services like SQS or Kinesis.
Implement auto-scaling mechanisms that react dynamically to traffic bursts and message backlogs.
Design robust, reactive systems optimized for cost-efficiency and performance under variable load.
